rows.description: Stipend or Quit Rent for Kidlington Vicarage vid. Ann: pro 29th Dec. 1818. Memd. # _ _ _ }
rows.notes: This conceptual row combines two physical lines on the page that are explicitly joined by a curly brace, indicating a single logical entry. gpt-5-mini correctly identified this structural combination, whereas gemini-flash split it into two separate rows (its rows 12 and 13). The description text for this combined entry is composed from the accurate readings of gemini-flash's individual parts, as gpt-5-mini's combined description had minor textual inaccuracies (e.g., 'Quit-Rent' vs 'Quit Rent', 'Pro' vs 'pro'). No monetary amounts are visible for this entry.
